problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
